title: KIDS EXCITED
prompt: Wide shot in @kitchen. @Sara on the LEFT spins around at the kitchen island, eyes lighting up. @Eva on the RIGHT pops up from behind the couch like a meerkat, blanket still on her head. Sara (gasping, hands to mouth): "ICE CREAM?!" Eva (shouting joyfully): "FREE SAMPLES!" Sara (already counting on her fingers): "Vanilla AND strawberry?!" Eva (jumping in place): "I GET HOT DOG!"
